@if (user) { @if (user.isAdmin) { @for (item of user.permissions; track item.id) { @switch (item.status) { @case ('active') { } @case ('pending') { } @default { } } } } @else { @if (user.canRequest) { } } } @let displayName = user?.firstName && user?.lastName ? user.firstName + ' ' + user.lastName : user?.email ?? 'Anonymous'; @defer (when user?.isAdmin && featureFlags.heavyDashboard) { } @placeholder { } @loading (minimum 300ms) { } @error { }
